component.name: Linepipe
component.summary: A modern GUI for managing pipx packages

description.p: Linepipe is a GTK4/Adwaita graphical interface for pipx, the tool that installs and runs Python applications in isolated environments.

ul.li: List all installed pipx packages with version, Python info, and exposed apps
Install packages with optional version pinning and dependency inclusion
Upgrade individual packages or all at once
Inject and uninject dependencies into existing venvs
Run exposed applications with custom arguments
Detect outdated packages by checking PyPI
Search PyPI with exact package name lookups
GNOME HIG-compliant with toast notifications and dark mode support
